name: Renan Brito Cano Butkeraites
title: Director of Technology @ Fresh Codes | Optimization, Heuristic Methods and AI
text:
Working with Leonardo has consistently been one of the easiest and most enjoyable parts of my day. He is a true problem solver: easy-going, reliable, and extremely competent.

Leonardo has a rare ability to turn complex, seemingly impossible problems into practical and achievable solutions. He thinks deeply about architecture, applies strong cloud and web development principles to highly complex products, and is always mindful of cost, efficiency, and scalability.

In particular, his ability to work with LLM-based solutions stands out. He understands how to maximize their potential while keeping systems efficient, well-structured, and technically solid.

I fully recommend Leonardo and would be very happy to have him on my team again in the future.

name: João Vitor Dutra Fonseca
title: Senior Software Engineer at VTEX | Backend Development Specialist | Python | C# | NodeJS | DevOps | Agile Project Management
text:
I had the opportunity to study alongside Leonardo at university and later hire him to join my software development team when I became a Development Coordinator.

Throughout our time working together, he consistently demonstrated exceptional technical skills, delivering high-quality software with impressive speed and efficiency. Beyond his strong development capabilities, he is highly dedicated, proactive, and always committed to finding the best solution for every challenge.

What stands out most is his sense of ownership and his drive to continuously improve both the product and the development process. He can be trusted to take responsibility, collaborate effectively with the team, and consistently deliver outstanding results.

I highly recommend Leonardo to any organization looking for a talented, reliable, and results-oriented software engineer.
